_comment: Caption track for the DeltaGlider Proxy 90s demo. Times are in SECONDS relative to the FINAL composed video (after the title card). compose.sh offsets the raw screen capture by TITLE_SEC and renders these as burned-in lower-third captions. Golden rule: savings as percent, never N×.

captions.text: Add a storage backend — encrypted at rest, no extra services
AES-256-GCM, proxy-side. The key stays yours
Delta compression on by default — versioned uploads dedupe automatically
Existing objects? One click to re-encrypt in the background
Create a bucket — routed to that backend, encryption inherited
Review the change, then apply and persist
Add an IAM user — fine-grained, attribute-based permissions
Scope it to a bucket and the actions it needs — nothing more
Group users for shared access policies
Browse objects through a standard S3 API — clients never change
Every object: real delta savings, measured live — 96.7% smaller on disk
